NeXTSTEP / OPENSTEP 4.2 — dock, Workspace Manager, file viewer

Clawmachine-fit: A. Dark chrome, 3D bevels, monospaced UI type. Anti-platinum. The 'pro workstation' voice for panels and inspectors.

Credits: GUIdebook Gallery, toastytech.com (Nathan Lineback), Paul Lynch MacUser scans, ArchiveOS.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
